occurrence_sentence: IonQ Opens Doors to First Dedicated Quantum Computing Manufacturing Facility in U.S.

interaction_phrase: the United States' first quantum computing manufacturing facility
occurrence_sentence: IonQ announced the opening of the United States' first quantum computing manufacturing facility, located in Bothell, Washington.
"The Seattle facility represents a tangible realization of IonQ's commitment to commercializing quantum and getting quantum computers into the hands of customers," said IonQ CEO Peter Chapman.

interaction_phrase: the United States' first quantum computing manufacturing facility
occurrence_sentence: IonQ announced the opening of the United States' first quantum computing manufacturing facility, located in Bothell, Washington.

interaction_phrase: the United States' first quantum computing manufacturing facility
occurrence_sentence: IonQ (NYSE: IONQ), a leader in the quantum computing industry, today announced the opening of the United States' first quantum computing manufacturing facility, located in Bothell, Washington, a suburb of Seattle.

interaction_phrase: securing a partnership expansion with Amazon Braket
occurrence_sentence: Today's announcement is the latest in a series of business and technical achievements for IonQ, including achieving [_#AQ35_](https://ionq.com/news/ionq-achieves-technical-milestone-one-year-ahead-of-schedule) one year ahead of schedule and securing a partnership expansion with Amazon Braket to bring IonQ Forte to the Amazon Braket Direct Program.
